---
pagetitle: "ISA RC42 Social Psychology - Home"
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.hero-fullbleed}
::: {.hero-overlay}
:::
::: {.hero-inner}
::: {.hero-kicker}
Research Committee 42 · Established in 1988
:::
<h1 class="hero-title">RC42 Social Psychology</h1>
::: {.hero-subtitle}
International Sociological Association
:::
::: {.hero-body}
A global research committee connecting scholars interested in identities, interaction, culture, inequality, collective life and the sociological study of social psychology.
:::
::: {.hero-actions}
[Join RC42](membership/index.qmd){.btn-rc42-primary .btn-sm}
:::
:::
:::

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- What RC42 Does (Editorial Split Layout) -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->

::: {.home-section .section-white .home-mission}
::: {.section-inner .section-wide}

::: {.editorial-layout}
::: {.editorial-intro}
::: {.section-kicker}
Mission
:::
<h2>What RC42 Does</h2>
<p class="editorial-intro-text">
RC42 fosters international research, debate, and collaboration in sociological social psychology. Our network bridges regions and research traditions to deepen our understanding of the relationship between social structures and individual experience.
</p>
::: {.mission-isa-mark}
<img src="images/logos/ISA.png" alt="International Sociological Association logo">
:::
:::

::: {.editorial-list}
::: {.editorial-list-item}
::: {.item-number}
01
:::
::: {.item-content}
<h3>International Research Network</h3>
<p>Connecting scholars across regions to study identities, interaction, emotions, attitudes, and collective life.</p>
[Membership Directory →](members/index.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.editorial-list-item}
::: {.item-number}
02
:::
::: {.item-content}
<h3>Scientific Exchange</h3>
<p>Supporting comparative research, theoretical development, and methodological discussion within the discipline.</p>
[View objectives →](about/index.qmd#objectives)
:::
:::

::: {.editorial-list-item}
::: {.item-number}
03
:::
::: {.item-content}
<h3>Events & Congresses</h3>
<p>Organizing sessions and academic exchanges around the ISA World Congress, ISA Forum, and other global spaces.</p>
[Upcoming events →](activities/index.qmd)
:::
:::

::: {.editorial-list-item}
::: {.item-number}
04
:::
::: {.item-content}
<h3>Newsletters & Resources</h3>
<p>Circulating newsletters, calls, publications, teaching materials, and resources relevant to our members.</p>
[Read the newsletter →](newsletter/index.qmd)
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::
:::

<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- Latest Updates (News Carousel) -->
<!-- Latest Updates (News Carousel) -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->
```{=html}
<section class="home-updates-section">
  <div class="home-updates-shell">
    <header class="home-updates-header">
      <span class="home-updates-kicker">Community</span>
      <h2>Latest Community Contributions</h2>
    </header>

    <div class="updates-carousel-wrapper">
      <div class="updates-carousel" id="updatesCarousel">
        <!-- Contenido dinámico renderizado por JS -->
      </div>

      <div class="updates-nav" id="updatesNav">
        <button class="updates-nav-btn" id="updatesPrev" aria-label="Previous updates">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"></polyline></svg>
        </button>
        <button class="updates-nav-btn" id="updatesNext" aria-label="Next updates">
          <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"></polyline></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="home-updates-footer">
      <a href="news/index.html" class="btn-view-all-updates">View all contributions &rarr;</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const carousel = document.getElementById('updatesCarousel');
  const prevBtn = document.getElementById('updatesPrev');
  const nextBtn = document.getElementById('updatesNext');
  const navContainer = document.getElementById('updatesNav');
  
  if (!carousel) return;

  function isPublished(item) {
    const status = (item.status || item.review_status || item.publication_status || "").toString().toLowerCase();
    if (!status) return true;
    return ["approved", "published", "publish", "accepted"].includes(status);
  }

  function formatLabel(value) {
    if (!value) return "";
    return value
      .toString()
      .replace(/_/g, " ")
      .replace(/-/g, " ")
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
  }

  function parseDate(value) {
    if (!value) return null;
    const date = new Date(value);
    return isNaN(date.getTime()) ? null : date;
  }

  function parseSubmissionIdDate(value) {
    if (!value) return null;
    const str = value.toString();
    const match = str.match(/(\d{8})[-_]?(\d{6})?/);
    if (!match) return null;

    const datePart = match[1];
    const timePart = match[2] || "000000";

    const year = datePart.slice(0, 4);
    const month = datePart.slice(4, 6);
    const day = datePart.slice(6, 8);

    const hour = timePart.slice(0, 2);
    const minute = timePart.slice(2, 4);
    const second = timePart.slice(4, 6);

    const parsed = new Date(`${year}-${month}-${day}T${hour}:${minute}:${second}`);
    return isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? null : parsed;
  }

  function getContributionCreatedDate(item) {
    return (
      parseSubmissionIdDate(item.submission_id) ||
      parseSubmissionIdDate(item.id) ||
      parseDate(item.created_at) ||
      parseDate(item.submitted_at) ||
      parseDate(item.date_submitted) ||
      parseDate(item.form_timestamp) ||
      parseDate(item.timestamp) ||
      null
    );
  }

  fetch("data/community_submissions.json")
    .then(response => {
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error("Could not fetch data");
      return response.json();
    })
    .then(data => {
      const latestItems = data
        .map((item, index) => ({ ...item, __originalIndex: index }))
        .filter(item => item.title && isPublished(item))
        .sort((a, b) => {
          const da = getContributionCreatedDate(a);
          const db = getContributionCreatedDate(b);

          if (da && db) return db - da;
          if (db && !da) return 1;
          if (da && !db) return -1;

          return b.__originalIndex - a.__originalIndex;
        })
        .slice(0, 6);
        
      if (latestItems.length === 0) {
        carousel.innerHTML = `
          <div class="updates-fallback" style="width: 100%;">
            <p>No community contributions are available yet.</p>
            <a href="contact/index.html#community-contributions" class="btn-rc42-primary btn-sm" style="text-decoration:none;">Submit a contribution &rarr;</a>
          </div>
        `;
        if (navContainer) navContainer.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }
      
      let html = '';
      latestItems.forEach(item => {
        const url = item.url ? item.url : 'news/index.html';
        const target = item.url ? 'target="_blank" rel="noopener"' : '';
        
        const typeStr = formatLabel(item.type);
        const catStr = formatLabel(item.category);
        const metaStr = [typeStr, catStr].filter(Boolean).join(' &middot; ');

        let typeVal = (item.type || 'other').toString().toLowerCase().trim();
        let iconName = 'other';
        let accentClass = 'community-card-accent--other';
        
        if (typeVal.includes('call')) { iconName = 'call'; accentClass = 'community-card-accent--call'; }
        else if (typeVal.includes('event')) { iconName = 'event'; accentClass = 'community-card-accent--event'; }
        else if (typeVal.includes('publication') || typeVal.includes('article') || typeVal.includes('book')) { iconName = 'publication'; accentClass = 'community-card-accent--publication'; }
        else if (typeVal.includes('resource') || typeVal.includes('data')) { iconName = 'resource'; accentClass = 'community-card-accent--resource'; }
        else if (typeVal.includes('news')) { iconName = 'news'; accentClass = 'community-card-accent--news'; }
        else if (typeVal.includes('opportunity') || typeVal.includes('job') || typeVal.includes('position')) { iconName = 'news'; accentClass = 'community-card-accent--news'; }

        html += `
          <article class="home-community-card">
            <div class="home-community-card-top">
              <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:0.6rem;">
                <div class="home-community-card-icon">
                  <img src="images/community-types/${iconName}.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
                </div>
                <span class="home-community-card-kicker">${metaStr}</span>
              </div>
              <span class="home-community-card-date">${item.date_published || ''}</span>
            </div>
          
            <div class="home-community-card-body">
              <h3 class="home-community-card-title">${item.title}</h3>
              <p class="home-community-card-excerpt">${item.description || item.excerpt || ''}</p>
              ${item.organization ? `<div class="home-community-card-org">${item.organization}</div>` : ''}
            </div>
            
            <div class="home-community-card-footer">
              <a class="home-community-card-link" href="${url}" ${target}>
                View contribution &rarr;
              </a>
            </div>
          </article>
        `;
      });
      
      carousel.innerHTML = html;
      initCarousel();
    })
    .catch(err => {
      console.error(err);
      carousel.innerHTML = `
        <div class="updates-fallback" style="width: 100%;">
          <p>Unable to load contributions at this time.</p>
          <a href="contact/index.html#community-contributions" class="btn-rc42-primary btn-sm" style="text-decoration:none;">Submit a contribution &rarr;</a>
        </div>
      `;
      if (navContainer) navContainer.style.display = 'none';
    });

  function initCarousel() {
    if (!prevBtn || !nextBtn) return;
    
    const scrollAmount = () => {
      const card = carousel.querySelector('.home-community-card');
      return card ? card.offsetWidth + 20 : 400; // 20px is the gap
    };

    const scrollNext = () => {
      if (carousel.scrollLeft + carousel.clientWidth >= carousel.scrollWidth - 10) {
        carousel.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
      } else {
        carousel.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount(), behavior: 'smooth' });
      }
    };

    prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      carousel.scrollBy({ left: -scrollAmount(), behavior: 'smooth' });
    });

    nextBtn.addEventListener('click', scrollNext);

    let autoPlayInterval;
    
    const startAutoPlay = () => {
      if (window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) return;
      stopAutoPlay();
      autoPlayInterval = setInterval(scrollNext, 4500);
    };
    
    const stopAutoPlay = () => {
      if (autoPlayInterval) clearInterval(autoPlayInterval);
    };
    
    carousel.addEventListener('mouseenter', stopAutoPlay);
    carousel.addEventListener('mouseleave', startAutoPlay);
    carousel.addEventListener('touchstart', stopAutoPlay);
    carousel.addEventListener('touchend', startAutoPlay);
    
    startAutoPlay();
  }
});
</script>
```


<!-- Member Directory CTA -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->

::: {.member-network-cta .member-network-video-section}

```{=html}
<video class="member-network-video-bg" autoplay muted loop playsinline preload="metadata" poster="images/backgrounds/member-network-poster.jpg">
  <source src="images/backgrounds/member-network.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>
<div class="member-network-video-overlay"></div>
```

::: {.section-inner .member-network-content}
::: {.section-kicker}
MEMBERSHIP NETWORK
:::
<h2>Explore the RC42 international member network</h2>
<p>
  Discover scholars working across regions, institutions, and research traditions
  in sociological social psychology.
</p>
::: {.cta-buttons}
[Browse members](members/index.qmd){.btn-rc42-primary .btn-sm}
[Board Directory](people/index.qmd){.btn-rc42-secondary .btn-sm}
:::
:::

:::

```{=html}
<!-- ================================================================ -->
<!-- RC42 Community Contributions Weekly Updates -->
<!-- ================================================================ -->

<section class="home-newsletter followit-updates followit-minimal">
  <div class="section-inner followit-minimal-inner">

    <div class="followit-minimal-copy">
      <p class="section-kicker">NEWSLETTER</p>

      <h2>RC42 Updates</h2>

      <p class="followit-minimal-lead">
        Receive community updates from ISA RC42 Social Psychology.
      </p>

      <p class="followit-minimal-description">
        Subscribe to receive calls, events, publications, resources, and academic
        opportunities shared through the ISA RC42 community.
      </p>

      <div class="updates-submit-action">
        <p class="updates-submit-note">
          Share calls, events, publications, resources, or opportunities with the RC42 community.
        </p>
        <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfjuQ7PX9qcXLSunPtl84DkhFYhLU_v1LbkepsVkvw7SAdNmA/viewform?pli=1&pli=1" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="updates-submit-button">
          Submit a contribution →
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="followit-minimal-form">
      <div class="followit-widget">
        <style>
    .followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  margin-top: 30px !important;
  padding: clamp(17px, 5%, 40px) clamp(17px, 7%, 50px) !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  border-radius: 6px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 5px 25px rgba(34, 60, 47, 0.25) !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview,
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview *{
  box-sizing: border-box !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-heading {
  width: 100% !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-heading h5{
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-input-field {
  margin-top: 20px !important;
  width: 100% !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-input-field input {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 40px !important;
  border-radius: 6px !important;
  border: 2px solid #e9e8e8 !important;
  background-color: #fff;
  outline: none !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-input-field input {
  color: #000000 !important;
  font-family: "Montserrat" !important;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 20px;
  text-align: center;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-input-field input::placeholder {
  color: #000000 !important;
  opacity: 1 !important;
}

.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-input-field input:-ms-input-placeholder {
  color: #000000 !important;
}

.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-input-field input::-ms-input-placeholder {
  color: #000000 !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-submit-button {
  margin-top: 10px !important;
  width: 100% !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-submit-button button {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 40px !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 6px !important;
  line-height: 0px !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .form-preview .preview-submit-button button:hover {
  cursor: pointer !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .powered-by-line {
  color: #231f20 !important;
  font-family: "Montserrat" !important;
  font-size: 13px !important;
  font-weight: 400 !important;
  line-height: 25px !important;
  text-align: center !important;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  display: flex !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  margin-top: 10px !important;
}
.followit--follow-form-container[attr-a][attr-b][attr-c][attr-d][attr-e][attr-f] .powered-by-line img {
  margin-left: 10px !important;
  height: 1.13em !important;
  max-height: 1.13em !important;
}

        </style>
        <div class="followit--follow-form-container" attr-a attr-b attr-c attr-d attr-e attr-f>
          <form data-v-5d9bed7e="" action="https://api.follow.it/subscription-form/aVJHbzRFTTFaRDRqd25oOXFEQktBQy83WnEwQW5YKzBBdjlyaDZWWHNLV3hvZHpDZndIT0N2OTVhQ1p4aUR6Z0ZxbDBuN21oM0p3Yy9uS3V6Tm1vMEs3TEhzTG9mdm40dFFsazVVU2tNL0NkaFV3MzZ3UUx2cEhVUkJlcDhVbDd8anJVeHh3cWpSM2hsWmxMK0FJdGtad3ZQQ1VENUZwZUtKSmVDeU5FZkpYND0=/8" method="post"><div data-v-5d9bed7e="" class="form-preview" style="background-color: rgb(248, 250, 252); position: relative;"><div data-v-5d9bed7e="" class="preview-heading"><h5 data-v-5d9bed7e="" style="font-family: Arial; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(23, 35, 58); font-size: 16px; text-align: center; text-transform: none !important;">Get new posts by email:</h5></div><div data-v-5d9bed7e="" class="preview-input-field"><input data-v-5d9bed7e="" type="email" name="email" required="" placeholder="Enter your email" spellcheck="false" style="font-family: Arial; font-weight: normal; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: 14px; text-align: center; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-transform: none !important;"></div><div data-v-5d9bed7e="" class="preview-submit-button"><button data-v-5d9bed7e="" type="submit" style="font-family: Arial; font-weight: bold; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 16px; text-align: center; background-color: rgb(0, 150, 136); text-transform: none !important;">Subscribe</button></div></div></form><a href="https://follow.it" class="powered-by-line">Powered by <img src="https://follow.it/images/colored-logo.svg" alt="follow.it" height="17px"/></a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p class="followit-minimal-note">
        You can unsubscribe at any time. Your subscription is managed through Follow.it.
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>
```
